title: SprintTask
description: An atomic task within a nightly sprint. Written by Planner, executed and updated by Builder.

task_id.description: Task identifier matching the ID from the task tree.

description.description: Full description of what Builder needs to implement. Should be self-contained — Builder should not need to look at another file to understand what to build.

estimated_minutes.description: Planner's estimate of how long this task should take Builder.

actual_minutes.description: Actual time Builder spent on this task from start to PR open. Filled in by Builder.

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must be in done status before this task can start.

started_at.description: Timestamp when Builder began this task.

completed_at.description: Timestamp when Builder marked this task done (PR opened).

pr_reference.description: GitHub PR URL or number. Filled in by Builder when PR is opened.

failure_reason.description: If status is failed, a concise description of why the task failed. Builder fills this in.

attempt_count.description: How many times Builder has attempted this task. Incremented by Builder on each attempt.

qa_verdict.description: QA's verdict on the PR for this task.

qa_notes.description: QA's notes on the PR. Filled in by QA after review.
